---
title: 'RNN / Sequential Processing'
subtitle: 'Stats M148 FingerHut Project - Second Round'
author: 'Charlie Kopp'
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    fig-align: center
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(torch)
dir.create("results/submissions", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## 1. Custom Dataset Class

```{r}
#| label: dataset-definition
SequenceDataset <- dataset(
  name = "SequenceDataset",
  initialize = function(parquet_path, subsample = 1.0) {
    raw_data <- as.data.table(read_parquet(parquet_path))

    # Subsample
    all_ids <- unique(raw_data$id)
    if (subsample < 1.0) {
      keep_ids <- sample(all_ids, floor(length(all_ids) * subsample))
      raw_data <- raw_data[id %in% keep_ids]
    }

    # Pre-split data by user_id - massive speedup
    self$user_data_list <- split(raw_data, by = "id")
    self$user_ids <- names(self$user_data_list)
    self$n_users <- length(self$user_ids)
  },

  .getitem = function(i) {
    # Instantly grab the pre-filtered user data
    user_data <- self$user_data_list[[i]]

    event_seq <- torch_tensor(user_data$event_idx, dtype = torch_long())
    gap_seq <- torch_tensor(user_data$log_gap, dtype = torch_float32())
    label <- ifelse(user_data$final_outcome[1] == "success", 1.0, 0.0)

    list(
      x_event = event_seq,
      x_gap = gap_seq,
      y = torch_tensor(label, dtype = torch_float32())
    )
  },

  .length = function() {
    self$n_users
  }
)
```

## 2. Model and Collate Function

```{r}
#| label: model-definition
LSTMModel <- nn_module(
  "LSTMModel",
  initialize = function(num_embeddings, embedding_dim, gap_dim, hidden_dim) {
    self$embedding <- nn_embedding(num_embeddings + 1, embedding_dim)
    with_no_grad({
      self$embedding$weight[1, ]$zero_()
    })
    self$gap_linear <- nn_linear(1, gap_dim)
    self$lstm <- nn_lstm(
      input_size = embedding_dim + gap_dim,
      hidden_size = hidden_dim,
      batch_first = TRUE
    )
    self$classifier <- nn_linear(hidden_dim, 1)
  },

  forward = function(x_event, x_gap, lengths) {
    x_emb <- self$embedding((x_event + 1)$to(dtype = torch_long()))
    x_g <- self$gap_linear(x_gap$unsqueeze(-1))
    x <- torch_cat(list(x_emb, x_g), dim = 3)

    # Pack the sequence so the LSTM ignores the padding zeros
    packed_x <- nn_utils_rnn_pack_padded_sequence(
      x,
      lengths,
      batch_first = TRUE,
      enforce_sorted = FALSE
    )

    out <- self$lstm(packed_x)

    # Now this safely grabs the hidden state at the LAST VALID timestep
    final_hidden <- out[[2]][[1]]$squeeze(1)
    torch_sigmoid(self$classifier(final_hidden))
  }
)

collate_batch <- function(batch) {
  # Grab true lengths before padding
  lengths <- sapply(batch, function(x) length(x$x_event))
  max_len <- max(lengths)

  x_event <- torch_stack(lapply(batch, function(x) {
    pad <- torch_zeros(max_len, dtype = torch_long())
    pad[seq_len(x$x_event$shape[1])] <- x$x_event
    pad
  }))

  x_gap <- torch_stack(lapply(batch, function(x) {
    pad <- torch_zeros(max_len, dtype = torch_float32())
    pad[seq_len(x$x_gap$shape[1])] <- x$x_gap
    pad
  }))

  y <- torch_stack(lapply(batch, function(x) x$y))

  # Return lengths with the batch
  list(x_event = x_event, x_gap = x_gap, lengths = lengths, y = y)
}
```

## 3. Training and Inference

```{r}
#| label: training-fit

num_embeddings <- max(read_parquet("data/processed/vocab_mapping.parquet")$event_idx)
model <- LSTMModel(num_embeddings, 16, 4, 64)
optimizer <- optim_adam(model$parameters, lr = 0.001)
loss_fn <- nn_bce_loss()

train_ds <- SequenceDataset("data/processed/train_lstm_sequences.parquet", subsample = 0.1)
train_dl <- dataloader(train_ds, batch_size = 64, shuffle = TRUE, collate_fn = collate_batch)

# Fit
model$train()
for (epoch in 1:5) {
  coro::loop(for (batch in train_dl) {
    optimizer$zero_grad()
    preds <- model(batch$x_event, batch$x_gap, batch$lengths)
    loss <- loss_fn(preds, batch$y$unsqueeze(-1))
    loss$backward()
    optimizer$step()
  })
}

# Inference
test_ds <- SequenceDataset("data/processed/test_lstm_sequences.parquet")
test_dl <- dataloader(test_ds, batch_size = 64, collate_fn = collate_batch)
model$eval()

# Pre-allocate a list of the exact size needed
pred_list <- vector("list", length(test_dl))
batch_idx <- 1

with_no_grad({
  coro::loop(for (batch in test_dl) {
    # Don't forget to pass batch$lengths from Step 2!
    batch_preds <- as.array(model(batch$x_event, batch$x_gap, batch$lengths)$cpu())
    
    pred_list[[batch_idx]] <- batch_preds
    batch_idx <- batch_idx + 1
  })
})

# Flatten the list into a single vector all at once
predictions <- unlist(pred_list)

fwrite(data.table(id = test_ds$user_ids, order_shipped = predictions), "results/submissions/sub3_lstm1.csv")
```
